# Change Log Template

Use this exact shape for meaningful real-world changes. Newest entries go first.

```markdown
## YYYY-MM-DD — Short change title

### Changed
- What changed.

### Reason
- Why the change was made.

### Files / paths touched
- `/path/to/file`

### Commands used
```bash
example command
```

### Notes
- Follow-up checks, caveats, or reminders.
```

If the exact commands are unknown, write `Unknown / not documented yet.` instead of inventing them.
